page_content:
Prerequisite: ENAE601.

ENAE799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits) ENAE898 Pre-Candidacy Research (1-8 Credits) ENAE899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits)

ENCE - Engineering, Civil

ENCE402 Simulation and Design of Experiments for Engineers (3 Credits) Review of statistics and hypothesis testing, sample design and design

of experiments, generation of discrete and continuous distributions and their applications. Introduction of simulation languages and simulation of discrete and continuous engineering systems. Output analysis, model validation and sensitivity and reliability analysis.
